name: v05-github-handler-push
description: Per-event GitHub webhook sub-workflow: handles `push`. Real deployments would update a build queue, kick off CI, post to Slack — this minimal version just summarizes the push for the smoke gate. Invoked from v05-github-webhook-router via the `subworkflow:` step shape.

inputs.expression: ({ handler: 'push', repo: ctx.request.body.repo || null, ref: ctx.request.body.ref || null, commits: Array.isArray(ctx.request.body.commits) ? ctx.request.body.commits.length : 0 })
